description: Generic topic pools for a story-driven drama template pack.
templates: A family secret resurfaces when an object from the past appears at the worst possible moment.
One sentence spoken in public destroys the trust that held a household together.
A quiet promise made years ago suddenly becomes the key to the present crisis.
A missing document, recording, or letter changes who the audience believes.
Two people remember the same night differently, and only one version can be true.
intro_scripts: Tonight's story begins with a line nobody in that room could take back.
What looked ordinary from the outside was already breaking apart inside.
By the time the truth surfaced, every relationship in the room had changed.

tone_pool: quiet regret that turns into confrontation
warm nostalgia hiding a delayed wound
social humiliation that becomes moral reversal
domestic calm shattered by one dangerous question
relationship_pool: siblings forced into the same room
arc_pool: misunderstanding -> deeper suspicion -> reveal -> bittersweet release
public humiliation -> hidden evidence -> reversal -> final price
trigger_pool: a bank message arrives at the table
a document is opened in front of everyone
safe_templates: old letter on a wooden desk, cinematic light, no people
empty hallway with one open door, dramatic light, no people
family photo frame beside a torn document, emotional still life, no people
